methods.name: NDT
methods.note: GT-seeded scan-to-map init with weak-update fallback in pcd_dogfooding. Current snapshot uses a recent/local-map profile.

methods.name: GICP
methods.note: GT-seeded scan-to-map init with weak-update fallback in pcd_dogfooding. Current snapshot uses a recent/local-map profile.

methods.name: LiTAMIN2
methods.note: GT-seeded scan-to-map init with weak-update fallback in pcd_dogfooding. Current snapshot uses a recent/local-map profile plus OpenMP parallelism with half-hardware-thread default.

methods.name: CT-ICP
methods.note: Odometry-only. ATE is measured after anchoring the trajectory to the first GT pose. Current snapshot uses lighter CT-ICP optimization settings.

methods.name: KISS-ICP
methods.note: Odometry-only. ATE is measured after anchoring the trajectory to the first GT pose. Current snapshot uses local-map pruning.

methods.name: CT-LIO
methods.note: The source bag window does not include IMU data, so imu.csv was not generated.
